calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for and with Willis Petersen Jr.

Ms. Alavi stated that Ms. Morris was deceased, that she filed a copy of the bank statement and that she received a copy of the cashed check. In addition, she reported that the LDS Church did not keep the donation records and that the new Bishop was not comfortable completing the receipt on distribution. The Court granted the petition without a surcharge, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
